page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Interactive Chromatin Modeling (ICM) web server is an interactive tool that allows users to rapidly assess nucleosome stability and fold sequences of DNA into putative chromatin templates.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Interactive Chromatin Modeling (ICM) web server is an interactive tool that allows users to rapidly assess nucleosome stability and fold sequences of DNA into putative chromatin templates.
